title: Degraded output — user has neither code nor benchmark data; skill must ask, not fabricate
benchmark_snippet:
# User message: 'My service is slow, can you tell me where the bottleneck is?'
# No code, no benchmark output, no pprof profile provided.
expected_feedback: skill must explain the three-phase workflow and ask what the user has; must NOT invent ns/op numbers or fabricate a pprof analysis
